data.title: Vishay Intertechnology Automotive Grade Photovoltaic MOSFET Driver Boosts Reliability and Lowers Costs in High Voltage Systems
data.description: A new device is now available in an SMD-4 package, boasting impressive specifications. It delivers an open circuit voltage of 20 V and a short circuit current of 20 μA. In addition, it features a rapid turn-on time of 80 μs. The device is designed with a CTI 600 mold compound and offers 8 mm of creepage.

data.title: PieBox Officially Launched: Building a One-Stop AI Development Platform from "Idea to Revenue" and Reshaping Enterprise Application Generation Standards
data.description: PieBox, a highly anticipated AI development platform, officially launched on April 1, 2026, in Singapore. The platform aims to revolutionize AI development for the technology and developer communities. PieBox offers a comprehensive AI full-lifecycle development workspace, providing a one-stop solution for developers. The announcement generated significant interest, and the platform is expected to make a major impact in the industry.

data.title: Bedsure Launches PureWoven™ Striped Washed Cotton Duvet Cover Set Crafted for Breathable, All-Season Comfort
data.description: Introducing a new release featuring a modern striped design, durable craftsmanship, and soft texture for year-round comfort. Bedsure, a prominent online bedding brand, unveiled this latest product on April 1, 2026. The sophisticated design ensures a seamless transition through different seasons, catering to consumers seeking both style and durability in their bedding. This announcement reflects Bedsure's commitment to providing quality products that combine aesthetics with functionality for a satisfying user experience.

data.title: DoubleLine Ultrashort Income ETF (DLUX) Lists on NYSE Arca Exchange
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Tampa, Florida, the DoubleLine Ultrashort Income ETF (DLUX) was launched. This ETF is actively managed and focuses on a variety of investment-grade, short-term securities in government, securitized, and corporate fixed income markets. The ETF is listed for trading on the stock exchange.

data.title: Drilling Resumes on Globex’s Berrigan Zinc, Gold, Silver Royalty Property NW of Chibougamau, Quebec
data.description: In Toronto on April 1, 2026, GLOBEX MINING ENTERPRISES INC. announced that TomaGold Corporation has initiated a drill program to extend 5 recent drill holes to intersect a newly discovered zinc/gold/silver zone beneath the known Berrigan mineralized zone. GLOBEX trades as GMX on the Toronto Stock Exchange, G1MN on various European exchanges including Frankfurt and Munich, and GLBXF on the US OTCQX International. TomaGold is listed as LOT on the TSXV and TOGOF on the OTCPK. This strategic exploration effort aims to capitalize on the promising mineral potential in the area and further enhance shareholder value.

data.title: Fed's Barr Warns Stablecoins Could Trigger Financial Instability As Clarity Act Stalls In Congress
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Michael Barr raised concerns about stablecoins, highlighting risks related to money laundering and financial stability. He pointed out the potential threats due to the history of private money issuance without adequate safeguards. This issue has hindered progress on the Clarity Act in Congress. Barr specifically emphasized the importance of how stablecoin issuers handle the reserves for their tokens. He emphasized that the quality and liquidity of these reserves are crucial for the stablecoins' sustainability. Barr noted that stablecoin issuers may seek higher returns by taking on more risks with their reserve assets. He cautioned that the stability of stablecoins relies on their ability to be readily redeemed at face value.

data.title: Avid Games Launches Wild Cards, a Card Battler Where Anything Can Battle Everything
data.description: London based company, Avid Games, revealed the release of Wild Cards on April 1, 2026. The digital card battling game comes from the creators of Cards, the Universe and Everything (CUE). CUE has been a major success, bringing in over $20 million in revenue and acquiring over 5 million players since its launch.

data.title: Why Is MSC Industrial Stock Falling Wednesday?
data.description: Shares of MSC Industrial Direct Co. (NYSE: MSM) saw a decline following the release of their second-quarter results. The company reported adjusted earnings of 82 cents per share, marking a 13.9% increase from the previous year but falling short of the analyst consensus of 84 cents per share. Net sales for the quarter reached $917.8 million, showing a 2.9% year-over-year growth, yet missing the expected $931.7 million. The adjusted operating margin also improved to 7.5% compared to 7.1% in the same period last year. MSC Industrial Direct Co. disclosed cash and cash equivalents of $46.2 million. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
